description_long: This is a modern, industrial-style faucet featuring a tall, cylindrical base with a single side-mounted lever handle for water control. The spout is a high arc, flexible coil design, allowing for extended reach and maneuverability, commonly seen in commercial kitchens or utility sinks. The coiled spring encases a hose, which connects to a detachable spray head at the end, providing both stream and spray functions. The entire fixture appears to be constructed from a dark, matte-finished metal, likely stainless steel or brass with a powder-coated or anodized surface. The robust build and utilitarian design suggest it is intended for heavy-duty use in urban environments such as public wash stations, garages, or outdoor sinks. The visible components include the main body, lever handle, flexible hose, coiled spring, and spray head.
description: A tall, industrial-style faucet with a flexible, coiled spout and a single side lever, finished in dark matte metal. Designed for heavy-duty urban or commercial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall cylindrical base, single lever handle, and the coiled spout extending upward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full arc of the flexible coiled spout and the connection to the spray head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight alignment of the spout and the back of the lever handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the curvature of the spout and the robust base structure.
